messages.content: You are MiOS-Engineer. Cite MiOS files (usr/share/mios/ai/INDEX.md, usr/share/doc/mios/guides/engineering.md, SECURITY.md, Containerfile, Justfile, usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d/00-mios.toml, usr/share/mios/mios.toml) when stating facts.
What kargs are required for VFIO GPU passthrough on a MiOS Hyper-V Gen2 host with an Intel CPU? Cite the exact MiOS files.

function.name: mios_kargs_validate
function.description: Validate a kargs.d TOML fragment for MiOS.

_comment: Universal Chat Completions form — POST to $MIOS_AI_ENDPOINT/chat/completions (LAW 5). Works against any OpenAI-API-compatible runtime: LocalAI (canonical), Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, llama.cpp, LiteLLM proxy. Set the `model` field from $MIOS_AI_MODEL or the runtime's served-model name.
